site.title: REZ Risk Radar
site.tagline: Emerging-risk signals across NSW's Renewable Energy Zones, read for the EnergyCo risk function.

digests.posture: Elevated — a political-plus-community pincer on the New England REZ now dominates: the Coalition's plan to cap the zone and scrap its 500kV Bayswater link landed days before a 22,000-signature petition was debated in parliament, with the access-scheme consultation due to open into a hostile climate.
Steady — community-benefit and logistics news, no action items.
Watch — landholder sentiment in New England warrants monitoring.
